---
title: "MB5370 - Programming Fundamentals"
author: "Ben Cresswell"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Introduction

This Quarto document is designed as a base template for the rest of the subject

## Running Code

To source the code in our workshop script we can use the `source()` function in R. This will execute the code in the specified file and make any functions or variables defined in that file available in our current R session.
```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Execute workshop 1 R script
source("../code/Module_01.R") # change the filepath/name if required 
```
